source.title: European Guideline on Chronic Pruritus: In cooperation with the European Dermatology Forum (EDF)
source.jurisdiction: European international specialty guidance requiring UAE adaptation
source.population: Adults with chronic pruritus, including dermatologic, systemic, neurologic, psychiatric, drug-related, pregnancy, and older-person contexts.
source.setting: Primary care, dermatology, and multidisciplinary assessment of chronic pruritus.
source.exclusions: Exact for a structured itch history, whole-skin examination, primary versus secondary lesion documentation, contextual review, and clinician-selected investigation documentation. It does not diagnose a cause or generate tests or treatment.
